title: Describe your typical weekend. What activities do you enjoy the most and why? What do you do on weekends that helps you to prepare for school on Monday?
extData:
{"answerTemplate":"点题: 
Begin with a general statement about your weekend: "My typical weekend is filled with [activities], which I find [adjective, such as enjoyable or relaxing]."
活动:
Mention the activities you enjoy: "One of my favorite activities is [activity], because [reason]."
例证: 
"For instance, on a typical Saturday, I might [describe activity and why you enjoy it]."
周一的准备:
Acknowledge the importance of preparing for school: "To prepare for school on Monday, I make sure to [activity, such as complete homework or plan my week]."
例证: "For example, on Sunday evening, I would [describe what you do to prepare for school]."
总述:
Conclude by summarizing your viewpoint: "In conclusion, my weekends are a balance of [rest/enjoyment] and preparation for the upcoming week.""}
